title: logmerge configuration
description: Configuration file schema for logmerge, a high-performance sequential log aggregator.

InputPaths.description: Directories or files to scan for log files.

OutputFile.description: Output file path. Defaults to stdout if omitted.

LogFile.description: Log/stats file path. Defaults to stderr if omitted.

ProfilingEnabled.description: Enable CPU and memory profiling to out/cpu.prof and out/mem.prof.

IgnoreFile.description: Path to a file containing ignore patterns (one per line, # for comments).

IgnorePatterns.description: Gitignore-style glob patterns. Matched files are excluded. Prefix with ! to negate (include). Last matching rule wins.

IgnoreArchives.description: If true, automatically ignore common archive extensions: .zip, .tar, .gz, .rar, .7z, .tgz, .bz2, .tbz2, .xz, .txz.

FileAliases.description: Map of glob pattern or relative path to display alias. Matched via filepath.Match against the virtual file path.

IgnoreTimezoneInfo.description: Strip timezone data from parsed timestamps.

ShortestTimestampLen.description: Minimum expected timestamp length in characters.

TimestampSearchEndIndex.description: How many bytes into each line to search for a timestamp.

WriteAliasPerBlock.description: Insert a --- filename --- separator line when the source file changes.

WriteAliasPerLine.description: Prepend the file alias to every output line.

WriteTimestampPerLine.description: Prepend the normalized timestamp to every output line.

MinTimestamp.description: Only include lines with timestamps >= this value. RFC3339 format (e.g. 2025-01-17T13:12:00Z).

MaxTimestamp.description: Only include lines with timestamps <= this value. RFC3339 format.

BufferSizeForRead.description: Total read buffer size in bytes, divided among all files.

PrintProgressEnabled.description: Show a progress bar on stderr.

InitialDelayMillis.description: Milliseconds to wait before showing the first progress update.
